Units.Subject: English Readiness
Units.Outcome: Recognise uppercase letters, follow simple instructions, name familiar objects, and use controlled pre-writing strokes.

Units.Subject: Maths Readiness
Topics: Big and small; more and less
Sorting by colour, shape and size
Units.Outcome: Count objects to 20, recognise basic shapes, compare quantities, and sort objects using one attribute.

Units.Subject: Rhymes
Units.Outcome: Recite age-appropriate rhymes with actions, rhythm, clear words, and confident group participation.

Units.Subject: Motor Skills
Units.Outcome: Show improving hand control, coordination, balance, and safe movement during guided fine- and gross-motor activities.

Units.Subject: Creative Play
Units.Outcome: Use imagination to create, solve simple play challenges, share materials, and interact positively with classmates.

Units.Subject: English
Units.Outcome: Identify and form letters, connect common sounds to letters, and read or speak familiar short words.

Units.Subject: Maths
Units.Outcome: Read and write numbers to 50, compare small quantities, and complete simple shape or number patterns.

Units.Subject: Environmental Studies
Units.Outcome: Talk about self, family, surroundings, living things, and healthy daily habits using suitable vocabulary.

Units.Subject: Rhymes
Units.Outcome: Recite memorised rhymes with expression, correct sequence, actions, and growing confidence.

Units.Subject: Art
Units.Outcome: Use basic art materials safely to create recognisable pictures, patterns, models, and simple craft work.

Units.Subject: English
Units.Outcome: Read short sentences fluently, understand their meaning, and write simple sentences with basic punctuation.

Units.Subject: Maths
Units.Outcome: Read and write numbers to 100 and solve simple addition, subtraction, comparison, and everyday maths tasks.

Units.Subject: Telugu
Units.Outcome: Recognise and write foundational Telugu letters, read simple words, and recite short rhymes clearly.

Units.Subject: EVS
Units.Outcome: Describe familiar people, places, living things, healthy routines, and basic safety rules.

Units.Subject: Art and Craft
Units.Outcome: Plan and complete simple creative work using colour, shape, texture, and age-appropriate craft techniques.

Units.Subject: English
Units.Outcome: Read short texts, answer direct questions, use basic grammar, and write clear simple sentences.

Units.Subject: Maths
Units.Outcome: Compare two-digit numbers and solve basic addition, subtraction, measurement, time, money, and pattern problems.

Units.Subject: Telugu
Units.Outcome: Read and write familiar Telugu words and simple sentences, and understand short oral or written passages.

Units.Subject: EVS
Units.Outcome: Observe and describe the immediate environment and practise healthy, clean, safe, and responsible habits.

Units.Subject: Computer Basics
Topics: Uses and parts of a computer
Units.Outcome: Identify main computer parts, operate a mouse and keyboard, create a simple drawing, and follow basic safety rules.

Units.Subject: English
Units.Outcome: Read age-appropriate texts with understanding and produce connected, grammatically simple sentences.

Units.Subject: Maths
Units.Outcome: Use place value and the four basic operations to solve routine numerical and real-life problems.

Units.Subject: Telugu
Units.Outcome: Read short Telugu texts, explain key ideas, spell familiar words, and write a few connected sentences.

Units.Subject: EVS
Units.Outcome: Relate everyday needs and community life to the natural world and make responsible health and safety choices.

Units.Subject: Computer
Units.Outcome: Use basic input tools and applications, organise simple files, and explain safe, responsible computer use.

Units.Subject: English
Units.Outcome: Interpret short texts, apply foundational grammar, and organise ideas into a coherent paragraph or informal letter.

Units.Subject: Maths
Topics: Length, mass, capacity, time and money
Units.Outcome: Calculate accurately with whole numbers and apply fractions, measurement, geometry, and data skills to problems.

Units.Subject: Telugu
Units.Outcome: Understand grade-level Telugu passages and communicate ideas using accurate sentences and structured short writing.

Units.Subject: Science
Units.Outcome: Classify living things and materials, explain basic body and physical processes, and suggest ways to protect resources.

Units.Subject: Social Studies
Units.Outcome: Use simple maps and explain how communities, services, occupations, culture, and civic responsibilities are connected.

Units.Subject: English
Units.Outcome: Infer meaning from grade-level texts and write organised, varied paragraphs using appropriate grammar and vocabulary.

Units.Subject: Maths
Units.Outcome: Solve multi-step numerical problems and represent reasoning using fractions, geometry, measurement, and data.

Units.Subject: Telugu
Topics: Grammar, verb forms and sentence types
Units.Outcome: Analyse grade-level Telugu texts and express ideas clearly through accurate, well-sequenced oral and written language.

Units.Subject: Science
Topics: Water cycle, soil and environmental care
Units.Outcome: Explain key life and physical science processes, record observations, and connect conservation choices to the environment.

Units.Subject: Social Studies
Units.Outcome: Read maps and timelines and explain how geography, history, government, and economic activities shape life in India.

Units.Subject: English
Topics: Parts of speech and tense consistency
Essays, formal letters and creative narratives
Units.Outcome: Analyse texts, support answers with evidence, and produce structured writing with accurate grammar and purposeful vocabulary.

Units.Subject: Maths
Topics: Measurement, data handling and multi-step problems
Units.Outcome: Select efficient strategies for multi-step problems and justify work involving numbers, fractions, geometry, measurement, and data.

Units.Subject: Telugu
Topics: Essays, formal letters and creative composition
Units.Outcome: Interpret Telugu literature and informational text and communicate mature ideas through fluent, grammatically accurate speech and writing.

Units.Subject: Science
Topics: Force, motion, machines, light and sound
Earth, space, natural resources and conservation
Units.Outcome: Use evidence from observations to explain biological, physical, and earth science concepts and responsible resource use.

Units.Subject: Social Studies
Units.Outcome: Connect geography and historical change with democratic institutions, citizenship, economic life, and India's cultural diversity.
